# Concrete Lifting Insurance

> Specialized insurance for concrete lifting contractors serving the United States. Coverage for spray foam lifting, mud jacking, general liability, workers compensation, commercial auto, and equipment breakdown.

Concrete Lifting Insurance provides specialized commercial insurance coverage exclusively for concrete lifting and leveling contractors. We understand the unique risks of spray foam polyurethane injection and traditional mud jacking/slab jacking operations. Our policies are endorsed specifically for concrete lifting work—not generic commercial policies with exclusions.

## Insurance Products

- [Spray Foam Lifting Insurance](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/services#spray-foam): Pollution liability, equipment breakdown, and completed operations coverage for polyurethane foam injection contractors
- [Mud Jacking Insurance](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/services#mud-jacking): Coverage for cementitious slurry concrete leveling including blowout liability and property damage
- [General Liability Insurance](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/services#general-liability): $1M-$5M coverage for property damage and bodily injury claims
- [Workers Compensation](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/services#workers-comp): All-states coverage for workplace injuries common in concrete lifting work
- [Commercial Auto Insurance](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/services#commercial-auto): Fleet coverage including mobile equipment haulage for concrete lifting rigs
- [Equipment Breakdown Insurance](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/services#equipment): Coverage for spray foam pumps, mud jacking rigs, hydraulic systems, and hand tools

## Resources

- [Insurance Blog](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/blog): Expert articles on coverage, risk management, OSHA compliance, and cost savings for concrete lifting contractors
- [About Our Agency](https://concreteliftinginsurance.com/about): Founded in 2009, 2,400+ contractors insured, $48M+ in claims paid

## Contact

- Phone: 1-800-543-3843 (toll-free)
- Email: quotes@concreteliftinginsurance.com
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8am-6pm EST, Sat 9am-2pm EST
- 24/7 claims hotline available for policyholders

## Coverage by Method

- Polyurethane foam injection / foam jacking / polyjacking
- Mud jacking / slab jacking / cementitious slurry leveling
- Both methods for contractors offering both services

## Target Audience

Concrete lifting and leveling contractors including: spray foam lifting companies, mud jacking contractors, concrete leveling firms, foundation repair contractors, and general concrete contractors offering lifting services.
